chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-45 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 117/2026 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No. 118/2026 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. ------ 02.02.2026 Miss Ghulam Khadija Bhatti, Advocate a/w Petitioners. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. The petitioners seek protection against police harassment, which is being done allegedly at the behest of private respondents. When confronted with the alternate remedy under sections 22-A Cr.P.C, learned counsel submits that the private respondents are residents of Ghotki, where the petitioners cannot approach due to life threats. However, that is not the test under section 22-A Cr.P.C. Since the petitioners seek protection at Larkana, the Ex- Officio Justice of Peace at Larkana can exercise jurisdiction under section 22-A Cr.P.C to pass appropriate orders. With that observation, the petition is dismissed. Judge Manzoor
